        .list()
        .into_iter()
        .map(|def| {
            json!({
                "id": def.id,
                "display_name": def.display_name(),
                "when_to_use": def.when_to_use,
                "temperature": def.temperature,
                "max_iterations": def.max_iterations,
                "sandbox_mode": def.sandbox_mode,
                "tool_scope": def.tools,
                "subagents": def.subagents,
                "source": def.source,
            })
        })
        .collect::<Vec<_>>
